title: atriplex phyllostegia var. draconis
intro: Atriplex phyllostegia var. draconis, also known as the Dragon's Spine or Dragon's Saltbush, is a type of succulent shrub native to the islands of the Pacific Ocean, particularly in Hawaii. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Atriplex phyllostegia var. draconis include its potential to soothe sunburns, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote healing and well-being.
